The '''terbeast''' was a three headed canine creature that roamed the forests of [[Ogden Minor]], terrorizing the locals. The two [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Aayla Secura/Legends|Aayla Secura]] and [[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]] were sent to [[Death/Legends|kill]] the creatures. Terbeast were large three headed canine species that were very aggressive in nature. Their bodies resembled that of a bear but their heads were more akin to the look of a canine. Terbeasts have a monstrous bark and heart skipping growl.

{{Creature-stub}}
